description: For the month-end close, the accountant needs to run the process that calculates and posts depreciation for all fixed assets.

nodes.task_description: Initiate the monthly depreciation run in the fixed asset module.
The system calculates the monthly depreciation for every asset based on its depreciation schedule.

expected_outcome.value: The process calculates the total depreciation expense for the month.

nodes.task_description: The system automatically creates and posts the summary journal entry to debit Depreciation Expense and credit Accumulated Depreciation.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the summary journal entry has been posted to the GL.
